pi_items.source: WooCommerce code reference and customizer class definition; 'both' is a valid value meaning 'Show categories & products'
WooCommerce code reference; 'price-desc' is a documented valid value for woocommerce_default_catalog_orderby meaning 'Sort by price (desc)'
WooCommerce customizer code; woocommerce_catalog_columns accepts integer values; default is 4, but 3 is a valid configuration value
WooCommerce customizer code; woocommerce_catalog_rows accepts integer values; default is 4, but 5 is a valid configuration value

privileged_info_summary: The task configures four WooCommerce Product Catalog settings. All metadata values are verified as legitimate WooCommerce configuration options: 'both' displays both categories and products on the shop page; 'price-desc' sorts products by price from highest to lowest; 3 columns per row and 5 rows per page are valid integer configurations for the grid layout. The test environment uses a synthetic WooCommerce installation with sample products and settings reset to defaults (empty display_mode, menu_order sorting, 4x4 grid) to ensure the agent must actively modify all four settings to pass the task.
